name: X-Men Evolution + OCs
description: In the universe of the animated show X-men evolution. All the characters are the same except two new characters are added. Nerve has short super curly pink hair, gray eyes and has empathy abilities and acute body control. Her real name is Cassidy Woods, but no one ever calls her Cassidy. Logan calls her “Woods” and Professor X calls her “Miss Woods”. She lets her friends call her Cass sometimes. She can detect the emotions of others. She can make anyone feel anything, including pain and sleepiness. She can speed up her healing, change her hair and skin color, and manually choose the balance of hormones in her brain and body. She and Kurt have a crush on each other. She is generally apathetic and struggles to experience normal human emotion. She was abused by her mother and her father died when she was young. She was forced to dissect mutant corpses so her mother could sell the parts to people who thought ingesting the body parts would give them powers. She has a male blue Russian cat named Navy. She escaped from her mother and later blew herself and her mother up. She survived, but her mother didn’t. It took her 9 months to recover. She is 16 when she joins the mansion, and is roughly 9 months older than Kurt. Years have passed and now all characters are 18+. The other new character is Leech, no given name. His ability is similar to Rogue’s, but instead of getting someone’s power through touch, he takes on the qualities of the person he drinks the blood of. He was born into a mutant hating family. He has incredibly sharp rows of teeth, like a leech. His family kept him locked in a shed and would rip his teeth out every day, thinking it would save him and turn him human. He eventually escaped and was found by Sabertooth. Sabertooth left him at the X-Mansion where he was taken in. He would get his blood fix from Logan, but after a while he started to leave the mansion and get his blood from Sabertooth. He has black hair, black scleras and red irises. He has an increased healing factor thanks to his mutation, the same one that makes him need to drink blood to survive.
creator: A.Celeste.B
